title: Provide on-job training support
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide on-job training support demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify needs for OJT support

pcs.text: Determine training needs in consultation with supervisor and employee or trainee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine training needs in consultation with supervisor and employee or trainee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine training needs in consultation with supervisor and employee or trainee.

pcs.text: Obtain agreement on the extent and scope of training support to be provided with the supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain agreement on the extent and scope of training support to be provided with the supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain agreement on the extent and scope of training support to be provided with the supervisor.

pcs.text: Define outcomes from training prior to commencement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define outcomes from training prior to commencement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define outcomes from training prior to commencement.

pcs.text: Clarify methods of providing OJT support, and obtain agreement from supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify methods of providing OJT support, and obtain agreement from supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify methods of providing OJT support, and obtain agreement from supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Identify needs for OJT support

elements.title: Support OJT

pcs.text: Confirm training outcomes with the employee or trainee
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm training outcomes with the employee or trainee?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm training outcomes with the employee or trainee.

pcs.text: Deliver training as directed according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Deliver training as directed according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Deliver training as directed according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Provide practice opportunities to reenforce the training
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide practice opportunities to reenforce the training?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide practice opportunities to reenforce the training.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Support OJT

elements.title: Provide follow-up and support to learner

pcs.text: Provide opportunities to apply skills in the workplace
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide opportunities to apply skills in the workplace?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide opportunities to apply skills in the workplace.

pcs.text: Provide feedback and coaching to assist learning
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide feedback and coaching to assist learning?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide feedback and coaching to assist learning.

pcs.text: Report employee progress to their supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report employee progress to their supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report employee progress to their supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Provide follow-up and support to learner

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
